description_long: This object is a collection of various knives and swords, each with distinct blade shapes and handle designs, arranged in a horizontal row. The blades range from straight to curved, with some featuring serrated edges and others smooth, single-edged or double-edged profiles. The handles are mostly cylindrical or slightly contoured, with some showing visible guards and subtle decorative elements such as colored bands or simple patterns. The metallic blades have a matte gray finish, while the handles are primarily darker in color, possibly with brass or gold accents at the guard or pommel. The overall appearance suggests a display or selection of melee weapons, suitable for kitchen, utility, or martial purposes. The set is visually unified by the consistent scale and alignment of the objects, making it suitable for urban or domestic environments where such tools might be found.
description: A horizontally arranged set of knives and swords with varied blade shapes and handle designs, featuring metallic blades and dark handles with occasional gold accents.
description_view_0: A side view showing the thin profile of the blades, making the objects appear as narrow vertical lines.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full variety of blade shapes and handle designs, with clear visibility of guards and decorative accents.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blades and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_3: A rear view similar to the front, revealing the backs of the blades and handles, with less detail on the blade edges.
attribute_blade_type: mixed; straight, curved, single-edged, double-edged, some serrated
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical and contoured handles, mostly dark, some with gold/brass accents, minimal visible texture
attribute_ornamentation: simple colored bands and metallic accents
